title: Flocks Version Info
newVersionDesc: This update includes new capabilities, experience improvements, and fixes. Upgrade to review the highlights.
confirmUpgradeDesc: The service will briefly restart during the upgrade, and the page will refresh automatically when it is ready.
restarting: Service restarting, will auto-refresh when done...
restartTimeout: Service restart timed out, please refresh manually
dockerModeDesc: You are running Flocks via Docker. In-place upgrade is not available. Please pull the latest image and restart the container to upgrade.
